etymology.description: Šłł(Šłł) (g─ô, "halberd") + Úşü(Úşü) (ku├ş, "chief") = combination of weapon component with phonetic element -> halberd
etymology.interpretation: The character Šłú(ku├ş) combines the semantic component Šłł(Šłł) meaning 'halberd' with the phonetic element Úşü(Úşü), suggesting both the meaning and the pronunciation related to weapons.
